title: National Register #87002289: Russian Hill Vallejo Street Crest Historic District in San Francisco
content: National Register of Historic Places in San Francisco. Vallejo Street Improvements at Jones Street) Vallejo Street Improvements at Jones Street. Russian Hill - Vallejo Street Crest Historic District. Bounded By Broadway, Jones, Vallejo and Taylor. The Vallejo Street Crest Historic District is an island that escaped the great fire all around it after the 1906 earthquake.
